# Jacob Buys Your House
> Local cash home buyer in Wichita, Kansas

Jacob is a real estate investor based in Wichita, KS who buys houses for cash in any condition. No fees, no commissions, no repairs needed. Fair cash offer within 24 hours. Close in as little as 7 days.

## Contact
- Phone: (316) 368-3344
- Website: https://jacobbuysyourhouse.com

## How It Works
1. Submit your property address online or call/text
2. Receive a fair cash offer within 24 hours
3. Choose your closing date — as fast as 7 days
4. Close at a local title company, get your cash

## Why Sell to Jacob
- No real estate agent fees or commissions
- No repairs or cleaning required
- We pay all closing costs
- Any condition — fire damage, probate, hoarder, foundation issues
- Any situation — foreclosure, divorce, inherited, behind on taxes

## Situations We Handle
- Inherited property / probate / estate sales
- Facing foreclosure or behind on mortgage
- Going through divorce
- Sell as-is (no repairs)
- Tired landlord / rental property
- Behind on property taxes
- Relocating out of state
- Vacant or abandoned house
- Bad condition / major repairs needed

## Service Area
Wichita KS, Derby KS, Mulvane KS, Haysville KS, Andover KS, Augusta KS, El Dorado KS, Park City KS, Bel Aire KS, Valley Center KS, Goddard KS, Maize KS, and all of Sedgwick County Kansas

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How fast can you close?
A: As fast as 7 days using a local Wichita title company. You pick the date.

Q: Do I need to make repairs or clean the house?
A: No. We buy as-is. Leave whatever you don't want.

Q: Are there any fees or commissions?
A: None. What we offer is what you receive at closing.

Q: Is the cash offer fair?
A: Offers are based on real Wichita market data. No lowball tactics.

Q: My house is in really bad shape. Will you buy it?
A: Yes. Foundation problems, fire damage, hoarder situations — condition does not matter.
